selectionReason: The prior handoff named rubric, grade, template, and portfolio pages. Current source had support-page and phase-page adult panels, while these four public resource pages still lacked visible paired student and teacher responsibilities.
privacyAndSafety: No authenticated app routes, roles, permissions, tenant/site/program/student data paths, migrations, secrets, deploy settings, Cloudflare/OAuth config, or live data changed.
The slice uses existing public-guide source content and adds no fake links, fake metrics, mock pages, or private-workspace claims.

validation.notes: git diff --check reported only CRLF normalization warnings; all focused and broad validation commands exited 0.

nextRecommended: Run desktop/mobile public-route visual QA for guide-mode and responsibility-panel layout, or run hosted section-level permission proof when credentialed runtime is available.
doNotRepeat: Do not re-add public template/portfolio/rubric/grade responsibility panels unless regression removes data-public-page-responsibilities or focused source coverage.
